stemHtml: Which of the following most accurately defines the apparent wander of a gyroscope?

options.a: The tilting of the spin axis in the vertical plane due to an imperfectly balanced gyroscopic mass.
options.b: Wander as a result of the movement of the gyroscope over the Earth's surface.
options.c: Wander as a result of imperfections such as bearing friction and gimbal system imbalance.
options.d: The appearance to an observer on Earth of the change of direction of the gyroscope's spin axis.
